---

## Developmental Maturity Model — Stage Definitions

Stage 0 — Infrastructure (current):
  Benchmark: Self-awareness agents defined and deployed. Provenance protocol spec written. Baseline metrics captured. Dispatch format enhanced.
  Measured: Yes (this snapshot).
  
Stage 1 — Grounding:
  Benchmark: First 14a/14b cycle complete. First 15a/15b literature searches returned. At least 5 assumptions and 5 presumptions surfaced and tested. PRS extension (displacement vectors) implemented.
  Measured: 14a/14b cycle COMPLETE (10 assumptions + 10 presumptions extracted/surfaced on 2026-04-10). Awaiting 15a/15b search results to advance stage.

Stage 2 — Intra-tradition Consensus:
  Benchmark: Pilot cluster tripled (Hawkins×3, Friston×3, Levin×3 = 9 agents). Intra-tradition consensus mechanism operational. Consensus rate measurable (target: >0.6 agreement on PRS quality assessments).
  Measured: When tripled agents produce first consensus round.

Stage 3 — Cross-tradition Dialogue:
  Benchmark: Active inquiry cycle operational on consensus outputs. Cross-tradition hypothesis survival rate measurable. Health ratio r = intra-consensus / cross-survival, target: statistically > 1. First r measurement recorded.
  Measured: When cross-tradition hypotheses have been tested against consensus-validated PRS.

Stage 4 — Full Network:
  Benchmark: All 11 traditions tripled (33 tradition agents). Voting protocol operational. r measured across full network. Connection density > 5.0 per tradition. At least 2 paradigm-shift candidates confirmed.
  Measured: When full tripling complete and first full-network voting round executed.

Stage 5 — Maturity:
  Benchmark: Stable r in healthy range (statistically >1 but not diverging). System generating novel knowledge (NOVEL flags from 15a/15b). Connecting meme typology emerging. C2A2 demonstrably functioning as a Thousand Brains system.
  Measured: Ongoing; maturity is sustained performance, not a one-time gate.
